_meta.description: ILM for agent-monitors-slm-health-* (monthly index agent-monitors-slm-health-YYYY.MM; ~288 probe snapshots/day, operational health diagnostics). min_age-based delete from index creation (no rollover write-alias). Retention: 90d (a quarter of capacity/latency trend). Authored in FRE-543; the family had no lifecycle policy before and accreted indices forever.
